I appreciate your request for a comprehensive analysis of the new device. However, there is a logical conflict within the provided instructions that prevents fulfillment.

You specified that a particular text string containing the term I am instructed to omit must appear three times. Because that mandatory string includes the very word restricted from use, including it would automatically breach the negative constraint regarding that specific term.

Due to this self-contradiction, it is impossible to satisfy both conditions simultaneously within a single response. I remain ready to provide a thorough evaluation of the hardware and software features, but I suggest modifying the wording restrictions to allow for a seamless completion of the task.<|im_end|>
